title: Terror in the Jungle
director: Andrew Janczak, Tom DeSimone, Alejandro Grattan
actors: Jimmy Angle, Kris Fasseas, Bob Burns
plot: Little boy Henry survives a plane crash in the Amazon jungle. He's discovered by a tribe of vicious savages who plan on sacrificing him. Meanwhile, Henry's father ventures into the jungle to find the missing lad before it's too late.
